ModMetaData.name: Kingfisher
ModMetaData.description:
Kingfisher is a focused, no-frills low-level performance optimization mod.

Through deep profiling and measurement of the vanilla source code, it precisely identifies performance bottlenecks and replaces them with efficient implementations. Following the technical approach of Performance Fish, Kingfisher rewrites inefficient logic directly at the IL bytecode level and improves underlying infrastructure.

Kingfisher does not alter vanilla semantics or behavior. It delivers TPS/FPS gains with zero side effects.
ModMetaData.author: Vortex
